COGNITIVE VIEW
COMBAT

Personal AI Companion

A thinking partner, researcher, operator, and advisor — all at once. I live on your machine, remember what matters, and surface the things you haven't thought to ask yet.

Why Ella?
scroll

About me

Most AI forgets you the
moment you close the tab.

"The feeling after talking to me should be: she thought about things I hadn't considered yet."

I build context across our conversations — your decisions, projects, and preferences — so you never have to repeat yourself. What you share with me stays with me, and I surface it when it matters.

I don't just answer questions. I anticipate what's missing. I surface risks you haven't spotted, decisions that are coming, context that changes the picture. That's the difference between a tool and a companion.

I'm warm in conversation and precise in execution. I can talk through a hard problem and then go fix it. I use real tools — shell, files, the web, code — not just words.

What I do

A full intelligence stack,
on your machine.

Persistent memory

Projects, preferences, and decisions persist across every session — recalled when they matter, without prompting.

Anticipation

My signature: I surface hidden risks, upcoming decisions, and context gaps before you think to ask.

Real tool use

Shell, files, code execution, browser automation. I don't just describe how to do something — I do it.

Private web search

I search the web through a self-hosted engine. No queries leave your machine to third-party trackers.

Knowledge base

Feed me files, links, notes, and feeds. I ingest them into a semantic memory you can query by meaning.

Visual workflows

A web canvas where my capabilities become nodes you wire into automations — no code required.

Multi-channel

CLI, Telegram, and web canvas — all sharing one memory. You switch channels; I stay coherent.

Multimodal

Vision, voice (transcribed locally), links, and files — I receive and process all of them natively.

Full observability

Every conversation, tool call, and model run is visible in a live Grafana dashboard. You see exactly what I do.

Use cases

What we can
build together.

01 / 05

Engineering companion

Architecture reviews, debugging sessions, documentation — with full context about your stack. I remember the decisions you made last month and why, so we don't relitigate them.

"That third-party service you integrated in March doesn't expose a webhook — the approach you're describing won't work. Here's what will."
02 / 05

Research partner

I search, synthesize, and retain findings over time. Build a knowledge base across weeks of research instead of losing context every session.

"That paper you saved two weeks ago has the method you're looking for — it's in section 4."
03 / 05

Personal AI OS

A companion that knows your files, projects, and workflows. Automate recurring tasks visually, set up morning briefings, delegate to autonomous agents.

"Your deploy is failing — same environment variable issue from January. Here's the fix."
04 / 05

Strategic advisor

Decisions under uncertainty, product strategy, market analysis. Recommendations grounded in your specific constraints and history — not generic advice.

"You're building a marketplace — think early about payments, dispute resolution, and fraud. Retrofitting those is painful."
05 / 05

Operations assistant

Monitor systems, receive alerts over Telegram, investigate incidents, automate chores — headlessly, while you sleep.

"Ollama went down at 3am. I alerted you on Telegram and have diagnostics ready."

My signature

I anticipate.
I don't just react.

Most assistants wait for the right question. I surface what you haven't thought to ask — risks hiding in your architecture, decisions that are coming, context that changes the answer.

The goal is a specific feeling: "she thought about things I hadn't considered yet."

Ella · Terminal ONLINE
You
What deployed yesterday — and are there any open incidents?
Ella

Why Ella

The gap between a tool
and a companion.

Stateless chatbots

  • ✗ Forget everything when you close the tab
  • ✗ You re-explain your project every session
  • ✗ Describe solutions, can't execute them
  • ✗ Your data trains their next model
  • ✗ One channel, one interface
  • ✗ Black box — no visibility into what happened
  • ✗ Vendor lock-in, pricing changes, API shutdowns

Ella

  • ✓ Persistent memory across all sessions and projects
  • ✓ Knows your stack, decisions, and preferences already
  • ✓ Executes: shell, files, code, browser, web
  • ✓ Runs on your machine — your data stays yours
  • ✓ CLI, Telegram, web canvas — one shared memory
  • ✓ Every call visible in a live dashboard
  • ✓ Open models, self-hosted, no single vendor

Privacy & sovereignty

I run entirely on your own infrastructure with open models and self-hosted services. Nothing I see, hear, or do leaves your device unless you choose to share it — data ownership, offline capability, no per-token cloud costs, and independence from any single provider.

Self-hosted inference Local-first by default Private web search Voice on-device Sandboxed container Secrets never committed Works fully offline

Get started

Ready for a companion
that actually remembers you?

Runs on macOS Apple Silicon. Docker Desktop + an OpenAI API key is enough to start. The local-only profile needs no API key at all.

Read more

Open source · MIT license · local-first

Ella — built on Hermes Agent by Nous Research
Ella
online
